## Problem

What workflow or quality gap should this solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the command, template, extension, integration, or docs change.

## Users

Who benefits from this?

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Docs updated
- [ ] Tests or smoke check added
- [ ] Example or migration note included when useful
